finding_results.notes: Replaced euphemistic phrasing with explicit accountability (he bailed on intake and left Theo to answer alone) and added immediate embodied impact (heat rise, stomach clench, breath control).
Rewrote Eli's fallback as a complete contingency plan with a concrete deadline and cash threshold; Theo now pushes sequence/accountability against that plan.

Compressed duplicate ambient terminal beats into tighter transit texture and inserted a causally loaded Reno intake constraint (7:30 line cap, Thursday fallback) that directly raises next-chapter work/housing and transfer-timing stakes.
Adjusted Eli's pressured dialogue to natural high-contraction register while preserving reluctance to call.

summary: All four pass-scope structural/craft findings were revised in place: accountability language was made concrete, clipped dialogue was completed with contingency logic, pacing drag was reduced with a new Reno-causal beat, and Eli's contraction register was normalized in high-pressure exchange.
